intro: Nogah (meaning brightness or clearness) was one of the sons born to David in Jerusalem, listed among his children by his wives and concubines (1 Chronicles 3:7; 14:6). He is named between Nepheg and Japhia. Nogah does not appear elsewhere in the biblical narrative, and nothing further is known of him beyond the genealogical references. His name was part of the growing royal household David established at Jerusalem after he became king over all Israel.
